prompt:
Create a highly detailed square anime illustration of a moonlit beauty seated in profile inside an ornate dark Chinese-style teahouse at night. The main subject is an elegant young woman with very long silver-white hair tied in a high ponytail, loose flowing strands, floral hair ornaments, tassel earrings, pale skin, and glowing pink eyes. She sits gracefully on a carved black wooden chair, turned slightly toward the viewer, resting one hand near her lips with a calm, mysterious expression. Dress her in a vivid hot pink embroidered kimono/hanfu-style robe with delicate pale floral patterns, layered white inner fabric, sash details, and soft folds across her lap. Use a mostly monochrome black, charcoal, white, and gray palette with saturated neon magenta accents.

The environment should be richly decorated: dark carved wooden wall panels, framed floral paintings, shelves with teaware, a round pink hanging lantern in the upper right, a low tea table with exactly 5 visible tea-service items: 1 white teapot, 2 teacups, 1 saucer/plate, and 1 small lidded bowl. Add steam curling upward from one cup. Include exactly 3 visible text signs in glowing pink Chinese characters: a large vertical sign on the right reading 月下美人, a smaller vertical sign on the left reading 花開富貴, and a tiny red seal-like mark beneath the main sign. Surround the composition with exactly 4 prominent white lilies in the foreground, plus clusters of small white blossoms near the right side.

Visual style: polished dark fantasy anime, ultra-detailed linework, dramatic rim lighting, glossy highlights, deep shadows, intricate ornamental patterns, cinematic composition, high contrast. Add multiple neon pink magical light trails: one crescent arc above her hair, one spiral around the foreground lilies, one horizontal swirl near the right wall, and one sweeping ring across the lower foreground. Scatter small pink glowing particles throughout the room. Keep the image square, centered on the woman, with no modern objects, no watermark, and no extra readable text beyond the specified signs.
